ZDLRA Technical Resources
Technical Resources
Your most critical information is stored in Oracle Databases. It needs to be instantly protected and rapidly and reliably recovered in the event of an outage, regardless of the cause—human error, system failure, cyberattack, or disaster.
You need a solution that’s integrated with Oracle Database to eliminate data loss and accelerate recovery across your enterprise.
